query: How does the daily transaction batch cycle work?

results.name: 9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE (lines 637-654)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE DALYREJS-FILE                                                  
           IF  DALYREJS-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING DAILY REJECTS FILE'                       
               MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN01C.cbl
Program: CBTRN01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN (lines 252-270)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN.
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.
           OPEN INPUT DALYTRAN-FILE
           IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING DAILY TRANSACTION FILE'
               MOVE DALYTRAN-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.

      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 2000-POST-TRANSACTION
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 2000-POST-TRANSACTION (lines 424-445)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 2700-UPDATE-TCATBAL, PERFORM 2800-UPDATE-ACCOUNT-REC, PERFORM 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE, PERFORM Z-GET-DB2-FORMAT-TIMESTAMP
results.summary: paragraph 2000-POST-TRANSACTION in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 2700-UPDATE-TCATBAL, PERFORM 2800-UPDATE-ACCOUNT-REC, PERFORM 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE, PERFORM Z-GET-DB2-FORMAT-TIMESTAMP. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
2000-POST-TRANSACTION.                                                   
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-ID            TO    TRAN-ID                           
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-TYPE-CD       TO    TRAN-TYPE-CD                      
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-CAT-CD        TO    TRAN-CAT-CD                       
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-SOURCE        TO    TRAN-SOURCE                       
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-DESC          TO    TRAN-DESC                         
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-AMT           TO    TRAN-AMT                          
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-ID   TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-ID                  
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-NAME TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME                
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-CITY TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY                
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP  TO    TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP                 
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-CARD-NUM      TO    TRAN-CARD-NUM                     
           MOVE  DALYTRAN-ORIG-TS       TO    TRAN-ORIG-TS                      
           PERFORM Z-GET-DB2-FORMAT-TIMESTAMP                                   
           MOVE  DB2-FORMAT-TS          TO    TRAN-PROC-TS                      
                                                                                
           PERFORM 2700-UPDATE-TCATBAL                                          
           PERFORM 2800-UPDATE-ACCOUNT-REC                                      
           PERFORM 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE                                  
                                                                                
           EXIT.

results.content:
9500-TCATBALF-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE TCATBAL-FILE                                                   
           IF  TCATBALF-STATUS  = '00'                                          
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION BALANCE FILE'                 
               MOVE TCATBALF-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS                               
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.

results.name: 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE (lines 562-581)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
2900-WRITE-TRANSACTION-FILE.                                             
           MOVE 8 TO  APPL-RESULT.                                              
           WRITE FD-TRANFILE-REC FROM TRAN-RECORD                               
                                                                                
           IF  TRANFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO  APPL-RESULT                                           
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR WRITING TO TRANSACTION FILE'                      
               MOVE TRANFILE-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS                               
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
                                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.preamble:

results.summary: paragraph 9000-DALYTRAN-CLOSE in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9000-DALYTRAN-CLOSE.
           ADD 8 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT.
           CLOSE DALYTRAN-FILE
           IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING CUSTOMER FILE'
               MOVE CUSTFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT (lines 345-369)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT.                                                  
           READ DALYTRAN-FILE INTO DALYTRAN-RECORD.                             
           IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
      *        DISPLAY DALYTRAN-RECORD                                          
           ELSE                                                                 
               IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '10'                                       
                   MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT                                       
               ELSE                                                             
                   MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                       
               END-IF                                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               IF  APPL-EOF                                                     
                   MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-FILE                                      
               ELSE                                                             
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR READING DALYTRAN FILE'                        
                   MOVE DALYTRAN-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                            
                   PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                               
                   PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                   
               END-IF                                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.

results.name: 1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN01C.cbl
Program: CBTRN01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT (lines 202-226)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: READS FILE                                                    *.
results.content:
1000-DALYTRAN-GET-NEXT.
           READ DALYTRAN-FILE INTO DALYTRAN-RECORD.
           IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '10'
                   MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               IF  APPL-EOF
                   MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-DAILY-TRANS-FILE
               ELSE
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR READING DAILY TRANSACTION FILE'
                   MOVE DALYTRAN-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
                   PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
                   PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
               END-IF
           END-IF
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

0500-TRANFILE-OPEN.

           OPEN INPUT TRANSACT-FILE

               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT

               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT

               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
